title: A Hybrid ML & Transformer Framework for Sentiment Analysis
subtitle: Obesity-Related Social Media Conversations · IEEE Xplore
desc: Analysed 100,000+ obesity-related tweets (2017–2021) using a dual-annotation pipeline with TextBlob for lexicon-based scoring and RoBERTa for contextual labelling and then trained SVM, Naive Bayes, Random Forest, and LSTM classifiers. SVM achieved the highest accuracy at 93%, outperforming LSTM (72%) and highlighting the strength of classical ML on short-form social text. Presented at ICVADV-2026 (IEEE CIS) and indexed on IEEE Xplore.

title: Closed-Loop Liquid Dispensing System
subtitle: Image-Based Spatial Targeting & Deposition Verification · App. No. 202641065168
desc: A self-correcting agricultural rover that uses pixel-level computer vision to generate infection segmentation maps from plant surface images, converts them into precise nozzle orientation vectors, and dispenses pesticide micro-droplets only onto infected regions. Post-spray images close the loop detecting under-coverage or overspray and recalibrating nozzle angle, pulse duration, and pump activation automatically. Historical infection maps feed a time-series progression model for proactive treatment scheduling.
